name: Austin Tanner
text: I do not manage 5 different beefs around town simultaneously to get left out of the beat em up video game imre. **6 beefs now**

name: Terron Bartley (with E)
text: Hate to nitpick the product. I just have one thing. My first name is *Tarron* on it when I need the E for **Terron** Bartley. 😂

name: Ross Lougee
text: If I'm not in the f#@%ing game soon I'm gonna have a **meltdown**

name: Brandon Follett
text: I'm going to start fighting yall **in real life.**

name: Somebody I used to know
text: I DO NOT WANNA BE IN THIS GAME **AT ALL**!!

name: Amir Schuman
text: YES! I can't wait to beat y'all's ass 😁

name: Will Blaylock
text: I hereby declare that i do not give Facebook Meta my permission to use any of my personal data. I also do not give AI permission to look at my internet presence, *period.*

name: Xander Fraser
text: Wes looks like the final boss you have to beat expect he never loses 🤘🏽🏆

name: Wesley Johnson
text: I love that **both buttons are punch** for me

name: First Coast Comedy
text: Can't wait for everyone to fight **outside** First Coast Comedy!

name: Kevin the Fighter
text: This is incredible, thank you! ❤️ **I'm showing this to everyone!**

name: QA Department
text: It's all good lol sometimes on my phone I'll get to a good way down the road and then *the screen turns white.* 😮

name: A Local Legend
text: Holy sh#t that's cool as hell dude even in video game form **Wes is still in a wheelchair** lol 😂

name: Wes Johnson
text: I thought youd never ask. **Of course** i want to be in the fighting game 😆

name: Bill the Big Guy
text: Need a **big guy with high xp** for your game?
